name: workflow-value-reference-contract-audit
title: 复查工作流前后端节点值引用契约与占位参数解析
description: 复查工作流中下游节点引用上游节点输出值的前后端契约、占位符语法、保存结构、图转换、输入解析和执行日志。重点定位 TOOL 节点占位参数被解析为空的问题。禁止通过兜底逻辑吞错；如果引用配置错误或解析错误，应修改契约/保存/解析实现，并让错误明确暴露。
creator: zj669
notes: Completed. Unified workflow value reference contract to inputs.<key>, <nodeId>.output.<key>, sharedState.<key>. Removed sourceRef-to-SpEL conversion for new graph data, made reference resolution fail explicitly, removed Knowledge fallback query extraction, added TOOL required-parameter validation before MCP calls, and fixed duplicate scheduling by marking accepted ready nodes RUNNING before async execution. Verified with Browser Relay positive execution 56cdbc83-4b5d-43e9-bcd7-df295fdd3bff and negative execution 7c7fad9b-53ea-436b-88ab-a3bf2a3a5f2c. No test code was added.
